requiredInput: Review only PR #30 and these exact files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Known facts: the dashboard contains Day 1 Journey, Wellness Score 85, Rejuvenation Score 92, Duey identified as an AI wellness mentor, five timed protocol items, and Daily Check-in controls. styles.css has responsive breakpoints at 768px and 1024px but no explicit focus-visible rules. app.js uses browser alerts, duplicate click listeners, console-only check-in data, and no persistence. The Duey image uses an external placeholder URL. Do not invent React, src/ files, screenshots, user testing, or simulated evidence. Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact contract: {"type":"experience_review","summary":"plain-English review","passes":["finding"],"issues":["finding"],"mergeBlockers":["blocker"],"recommendation":"approve|changes_required","evidence":[{"path":"app/frontend/index.html","finding":"specific evidence"}]}. Every evidence path must be one of the five approved app/frontend paths.
expectedOutput: A schema-valid experience_review JSON object containing passes, issues, merge blockers, recommendation, and file-based evidence
